title: [Maintenance] 2026-03-06 - Homelab
body:
# [Maintenance] 2026-03-06 - Homelab

## Status

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Overall Status** | đźź˘ GREEN |
| **Last Updated** | 2026-03-06 22:35 CST |
| **Source Report** | reports/status-report-2026-03-06.md |
| **Assigned To** | gitea_admin |

## Context Pack

### Cluster Identity

| Component | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| K3s Version | v1.33.6+k3s1 |
| Node Count | 10 |
| ArgoCD Apps | 42 total |
| Ceph Status | HEALTH_OK |

### Current Health Evidence (Snapshot)

#### Metal Layer
| Check | Status | Details |
|-------|--------|---------|
| Nodes | đźź˘ GREEN | 10/10 Ready |
| Node Versions | đźź˘ GREEN | All v1.33.6+k3s1 (uniform) |
| CNI (Cilium) | đźź˘ GREEN | DaemonSet running on all nodes |
| Resource Usage | đźź˘ GREEN | CPU max 19% (charmander), Memory max 37% (squirtle) |

#### System Layer
| Check | Status | Details |
|-------|--------|---------|
| CoreDNS | đźź˘ GREEN | Running |
| Metrics Server | đźź˘ GREEN | Running |
| kube-system | đźź˘ GREEN | All pods Running/Completed |
| ArgoCD | đźź˘ GREEN | 42/42 apps Synced+Healthy |

#### Storage Layer
| Check | Status | Details |
|-------|--------|---------|
| Ceph Health | đźź˘ GREEN | HEALTH_OK |
| OSDs | đźź˘ GREEN | 7/7 up and in |
| Usage | đźź˘ GREEN | 40.3% raw used (1.4 TiB / 3.4 TiB) |
| Pools | đźź˘ GREEN | 4 pools, 177 PGs active+clean |
| Monitors | đźź˘ GREEN | 3 mons in quorum (f,h,j) |
| MDS | đźź˘ GREEN | 1/1 up, 1 hot standby |

#### Platform Layer
| Check | Status | Details |
|-------|--------|---------|
| Ingress-Nginx | đźź˘ GREEN | 1/1 Running |
| Certificates | đźź˘ GREEN | 28 certificates all True/Ready |
| External Secrets | đźź˘ GREEN | All SecretSynced |
| Cert-Manager | đźź˘ GREEN | No pending challenges |

#### Apps Layer
| Check | Status | Details |
|-------|--------|---------|
| All Pods | đźź˘ GREEN | Zero non-running pods |
| ArgoCD Apps | đźź˘ GREEN | 42/42 Synced+Healthy |

#### Network Layer
| Check | Status | Details |
|-------|--------|---------|
| VLAN Gateways | đźź˘ GREEN | All 5 VLANs reachable |
| OPNSense | đźź˘ GREEN | TCP 443 open |
| Internet | đźź˘ GREEN | Both DNS (1.1.1.1, 8.8.8.8) reachable, <17ms |
| NAS | đźź˘ GREEN | All ports open (SMB/NFS/HTTP/HTTPS) |

### Observations

#### đź”Ť Node Activity
- All 10 nodes healthy with uniform K3s version
- Resource usage well within limits (no node above 37% memory or 19% CPU)
- Transient events: Grafana readiness probe failed once (resolved), Ceph mon-f liveness timeout once (transient)

#### đź”Ť Renovate PRs
- 4 open PRs from Renovate (all mergeable, 10 days old)
- PR #67: Non-major dependency updates (multi-component patch/minor)
- PR #68: PostgreSQL 16â†’17 (MAJOR - matrix)
- PR #69: Debian 12â†’13 (MAJOR - archived moltbot)
- PR #70: Valkey 8â†’9 (MAJOR - nextcloud)

#### Network Evidence
- **Workstation â†’ Cluster**: đźź˘ Connected (kubectl + SSH)
- **Gitea API**: đźź˘ Authenticated (gitea_admin)
- **NAS (10.0.40.3)**: đźź˘ All ports reachable
- **All VLAN Gateways**: đźź˘ Reachable

## Proposed Changes (Spec)

| ID | Type | Layer | Priority | Impact | Downtime | Summary | Dependencies |
|----|------|-------|----------|--------|----------|---------|--------------|
| A1 | Update | System/Platform/Apps | P2 | Medium | None expected | Merge PR #67 - Non-major dependency updates (argo-cd, cert-manager, cloudflare, kanidm, ollama, rook-ceph, renovate, etc.) | None |
| A2 | Update | Apps | P3 | Low | None | Merge PR #69 - Debian 12â†’13 (archived moltbot container) | None |
| A3 | Update | Apps | P3 | Medium | Brief (nextcloud) | Merge PR #70 - Valkey 8â†’9 MAJOR for nextcloud | A1 |
| A4 | Update | Apps | P3 | High | Brief (matrix) | Merge PR #68 - PostgreSQL 16â†’17 MAJOR for matrix | A1 |

## Execution Plan

### Ordering Rules
1. Process P0 â†’ P1 â†’ P2 â†’ P3
2. Within priority: Metal â†’ Network â†’ Storage â†’ System â†’ Platform â†’ Apps
3. One change at a time with validation
4. Database-related changes (A4) last

### Validation Gate (After Each Change)

```bash
kubectl get nodes | grep -v "Ready" || true
kubectl get pods -n kube-system | grep -v "Running\|Completed" || true
kubectl get applications -n argocd | grep -v "Synced.*Healthy" || true
kubectl -n rook-ceph exec deploy/rook-ceph-tools -- ceph health
kubectl get pods -A --no-headers | grep -v "Running\|Completed" || true
```

**PASS Criteria**: All greps return empty + ceph health = HEALTH_OK

### Stop Conditions
- Any non-GREEN validation result
- Node NotReady status
- Ceph health â‰  HEALTH_OK

## Action Items (Tasks)

- [ ] **A1 P2 System/Platform/Apps**: Merge PR #67 - Non-major dependency updates
  **Goal**: Apply all non-major dependency patches (argo-cd 9.4.4â†’9.4.7, cert-manager v1.19.3â†’v1.19.4, cloudflare 5.17â†’5.18, kanidm 1.9.0â†’1.9.1, ollama patch, rook-ceph patches, renovate update, etc.)
  **Commands**:
  ```bash
  source ~/.config/gitea/.env
  curl -s -X POST "https://git.eaglepass.io/api/v1/repos/ops/homelab/pulls/67/merge"     -H "Authorization: token $GITEA_TOKEN"     -H "Content-Type: application/json"     -d '{"Do":"merge","merge_message_field":"fix(deps): update all non-major dependencies","delete_branch_after_merge":true}'
  ```
  **Expected**: PR merged, ArgoCD syncs automatically, all apps return to Synced+Healthy within 10 minutes
  **If fails**: Check ArgoCD app status, review pod logs for failing components, consider reverting specific image tags
  **Rollback**: Revert merge commit on master branch

- [ ] **A2 P3 Apps**: Merge PR #69 - Debian 12-slimâ†’13-slim (archived moltbot)
  **Goal**: Update debian base image for moltbot container
  **Commands**:
  ```bash
  source ~/.config/gitea/.env
  curl -s -X POST "https://git.eaglepass.io/api/v1/repos/ops/homelab/pulls/69/merge"     -H "Authorization: token $GITEA_TOKEN"     -H "Content-Type: application/json"     -d '{"Do":"merge","merge_message_field":"chore(deps): update debian docker tag to v13","delete_branch_after_merge":true}'
  ```
  **Expected**: PR merged, moltbot pod restarts with new base image
  **If fails**: Check moltbot pod logs, verify image pull succeeds
  **Rollback**: Revert merge commit on master branch

- [ ] **A3 P3 Apps**: Merge PR #70 - Valkey 8.1â†’9.0 MAJOR (nextcloud)
  **Goal**: Update Valkey (Redis-compatible) to v9 for nextcloud cache
  **Commands**:
  ```bash
  source ~/.config/gitea/.env
  curl -s -X POST "https://git.eaglepass.io/api/v1/repos/ops/homelab/pulls/70/merge"     -H "Authorization: token $GITEA_TOKEN"     -H "Content-Type: application/json"     -d '{"Do":"merge","merge_message_field":"chore(deps): update valkey/valkey docker tag to v9","delete_branch_after_merge":true}'
  ```
  **Expected**: PR merged, nextcloud valkey pod restarts, nextcloud functions normally
  **If fails**: Check valkey pod logs, verify nextcloud can connect to cache, check for breaking API changes in Valkey 9
  **Rollback**: Revert merge commit on master branch, valkey pod will restart with v8.1

- [ ] **A4 P3 Apps**: Merge PR #68 - PostgreSQL 16â†’17 MAJOR (matrix)
  **Goal**: Update PostgreSQL to v17 for matrix (Synapse) database
  **Commands**:
  ```bash
  # Pre-merge: verify matrix DB backup exists or create one
  kubectl exec -n matrix deploy/matrix-synapse-postgresql-0 -- pg_dump -U synapse synapse > /tmp/matrix-db-backup-$(date +%F).sql 2>/dev/null || echo "Backup via pg_dump may need adjustment"
  
  source ~/.config/gitea/.env
  curl -s -X POST "https://git.eaglepass.io/api/v1/repos/ops/homelab/pulls/68/merge"     -H "Authorization: token $GITEA_TOKEN"     -H "Content-Type: application/json"     -d '{"Do":"merge","merge_message_field":"chore(deps): update bitnamilegacy/postgresql docker tag to v17","delete_branch_after_merge":true}'
  ```
  **Expected**: PR merged, PostgreSQL pod restarts with v17, matrix/synapse reconnects successfully
  **If fails**: Check PostgreSQL pod logs for upgrade compatibility issues, verify data directory compatibility between PG 16â†’17, check if pg_upgrade is needed
  **Rollback**: Revert merge commit on master branch, PG pod restarts with v16

- [ ] **V1 P2 All**: Final validation gate
  **Goal**: Confirm all layers GREEN after all changes
  **Commands**:
  ```bash
  kubectl get nodes | grep -v "Ready" || true
  kubectl get pods -n kube-system | grep -v "Running\|Completed" || true
  kubectl get applications -n argocd | grep -v "Synced.*Healthy" || true
  kubectl -n rook-ceph exec deploy/rook-ceph-tools -- ceph health
  kubectl get pods -A --no-headers | grep -v "Running\|Completed" || true
  ```
  **Expected**: All checks return empty/HEALTH_OK
  **If fails**: Investigate non-GREEN layer, troubleshoot specific component
  **Rollback**: N/A (validation only)

## Change Log

| Timestamp | Phase | Item | Action | Result | Status After |
|-----------|:-----:|------|--------|--------|:------------:|
| 2026-03-06 22:35 | Recon | All layers | Evidence capture + analysis | All GREEN | đźź˘ GREEN |

## Closure (Filled by homelab-action)

### Completion Criteria:
- [ ] All action items completed or explicitly deferred
- [ ] All validation gates passed
- [ ] No regressions in cluster health
- [ ] Maintenance issue closed

**Final Status**: PENDING

**Closed By**: PENDING
**Closed Date**: PENDING

title: Dependency Dashboard
body:
This issue lists Renovate updates and detected dependencies. Read the [Dependency Dashboard](https://docs.renovatebot.com/key-concepts/dashboard/) docs to learn more. ## Repository Problems Renovate tried to run on this repository, but found these problems. - âš ď¸Ź WARN: GitHub token is required for some dependencies - âš ď¸Ź WARN: No github.com token has been configured. Skipping release notes retrieval ## Open The following updates have all been created. To force a retry/rebase of any, click on a checkbox below. - [ ] [fix(deps): update all non-major dependencies](pulls/67) (`argo-cd`, `bitnamilegacy/postgresql`, `cert-manager`, `cloudflare`, `docker.io/kanidm/server`, `ghcr.io/kagent-dev/kagent/tools`, `go`, `k8s.io/api`, `k8s.io/apimachinery`, `k8s.io/client-go`, `kube-prometheus-stack`, `ollama`, `postgres`, `registry.rocket.chat/rocketchat/rocket.chat`, `renovate`, `rook-ceph`, `rook-ceph-cluster`, `supabase/edge-runtime`, `supabase/gotrue`, `supabase/logflare`, `supabase/postgres`, `supabase/postgres-meta`, `supabase/realtime`, `supabase/storage-api`, `volsync`) - [ ] [chore(deps): update bitnamilegacy/postgresql docker tag to v17](pulls/68) - [ ] [chore(deps): update docker.io/library/debian docker tag to v13](pulls/69) - [ ] [chore(deps): update valkey/valkey docker tag to v9](pulls/70) - [ ] **Click on this checkbox to rebase all open PRs at once** ## Detected Dependencies
